<div style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 10px; max-width: 652px; z-index: 1; margin-top: 0px; color: rgb(230, 232, 240); font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-style: normal; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; white-space: normal; background-color: rgb(16, 18, 24); text-decoration-thickness: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial;"><div><div style="display: flex; gap: 4px; margin-left: auto; width: fit-content;"><div style="display: flex; position: relative; overflow: hidden; background-color: var(--XKMDxc); border-radius: 24px 4px 24px 24px; padding: 12px 16px; width: fit-content; flex-direction: column; max-inline-size: 472px; margin-left: auto;"><div style="display: flex; flex-direction: row;"><span role="heading" style="-webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; display: -webkit-box; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; overflow-wrap: break-word; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; white-space: pre-wrap;"><span>why we often use lawful good to chaotic evil on memes. what do they mean.</span></span></div></div></div><div style="text-align: right; color: var(--IXoxUe); font-size: 12px; line-height: 16px; font-weight: 400;"></div><div></div></div></div><div style="color: rgb(230, 232, 240); font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-style: normal; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; white-space: normal; background-color: rgb(16, 18, 24); text-decoration-thickness: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial;"></div><div id="aim-chrome-initial-inline-async-container" style="color: rgb(230, 232, 240); font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-style: normal; font-variant-ligatures: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; white-space: normal; background-color: rgb(16, 18, 24); text-decoration-thickness: initial; text-decoration-style: initial; text-decoration-color: initial;"><div><div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div><div></div></div><div></div><div><div><div style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--m3c11,#eef0ff); position: relative; font-weight: 400; --m3c9: #e6e8f0; --m3c11: #e6e8f0; display: flex;"><div style="width: 652.438px;"><div><div style="display: contents;"></div></div><div dir="ltr" style="unicode-bidi: isolate; width: 652px; max-width: var(--CYi3c--fRcLaf,652px);"><div style="display: contents;"><div style="font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word; margin-block: var(--xdqYEb--pNrv5d,12px) var(--xdqYEb--i8AQde,16px);"><div style="display: contents;">The "Lawful Good" to "Chaotic Evil" charts you see in memes are based on the<span>&nbsp;</span></div><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Alignment System</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>from the tabletop role-playing game<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Dungeons &amp; Dragons</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>(D&amp;D). It is a popular meme format because it provides a simple, 3x3 grid to sort and rank anything—from movie characters to ways of eating a sandwich—into humorous categories.<span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: hidden; position: relative; max-inline-size: 250px; vertical-align: text-top; height: 20px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 3px; width: 20px; block-size: 20px; inline-size: auto; padding-block: 3px; padding-inline: 6px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><div style="align-items: center; display: flex; height: 14px; overflow: hidden; width: 82.4375px;"><img id="img-7S29acuMOt-LkPIPyYyBkAw_1" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Wikipedia" style="background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 20px; height: 12px; margin-right: 4px; width: 12px; flex-shrink: 0;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--IXoxUe); font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.45; display: flex; overflow: hidden; min-width: 0px; font-weight: 500;"><span style="overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; min-width: 0px;">Wikipedia</span><span style="flex-shrink: 0;">&nbsp;+4</span></span></div></button></span></span></div><div></div><div role="heading" style="margin-block: 24px 12px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: var(--JT4IPc); line-height: var(--qYGXw); letter-spacing: 0px; color: var(--jINu6c);">How the Chart Works<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><div style="font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word; margin-block: var(--xdqYEb--pNrv5d,12px) var(--xdqYEb--i8AQde,16px);">The chart uses two "axes" to define a personality or behavior:<span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 20px; align-items: center; box-sizing: border-box; overflow: hidden; position: relative; max-inline-size: 250px; vertical-align: text-top; height: 20px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 3px; width: 20px; block-size: 20px; inline-size: auto; padding-block: 3px; padding-inline: 6px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><div style="align-items: center; display: flex; height: 14px; overflow: hidden; width: 62.5625px;"><img id="img-7S29acuMOt-LkPIPyYyBkAw_2" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Figma" style="background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 20px; height: 12px; margin-right: 4px; width: 12px; flex-shrink: 0;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; color: var(--IXoxUe); font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.45; display: flex; overflow: hidden; min-width: 0px; font-weight: 500;"><span style="overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; min-width: 0px;">Figma</span><span style="flex-shrink: 0;">&nbsp;+2</span></span></div></button></span></span></div><ul style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px; margin-block: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; padding-inline-start: 16px;"><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">The Morality Axis (Top to Bottom):</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>Measures how much someone cares about the well-being of others.</span><ul style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px; margin-block: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; padding-inline-start: 16px;"><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: circle; padding-inline-start: 0px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Good:</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>Altruistic, respects life, and helps others.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: circle; padding-inline-start: 0px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Neutral:</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>Decent but mostly looks out for themselves or their immediate circle.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: circle; padding-inline-start: 0px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Evil:</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>Selfish, lacks morals, and is willing to hurt others for personal gain.</span></li></ul></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: disc; padding-inline-start: 4px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">The Order Axis (Left to Right):</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>Measures how someone feels about rules and authority.</span><ul style="margin: 0px; padding: 0px; margin-block: 12px 16px; font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; padding-inline-start: 16px;"><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: circle; padding-inline-start: 0px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Lawful:</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>Values structure, honor, tradition, and following a code.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: circle; padding-inline-start: 0px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Neutral:</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>Follows rules when it's convenient but isn't obsessed with them.</span></li><li style="margin: 0px 0px 12px; padding: 0px; list-style: circle; padding-inline-start: 0px;"><span style="overflow-wrap: break-word;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Chaotic:</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>Values personal freedom and flexibility; sees rules as restrictive or irrelevant.</span><span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></li></ul></li></ul><div></div><div role="heading" style="margin-block: 24px 12px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: var(--JT4IPc); line-height: var(--qYGXw); letter-spacing: 0px; color: var(--jINu6c);">What the 9 Alignments Mean<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><div></div><div style="overflow-x: auto; width: 652px; margin-block: 16px 24px; box-sizing: border-box; scrollbar-width: none;"><table style="border: none; border-collapse: collapse; table-layout: auto; width: 652px;"><tbody><tr><th colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 8px 16px 8px 0px; text-align: left;">Alignment<span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></th><th colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 8px 16px 8px 0px; text-align: left;">Summary</th><th colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 8px 0px; text-align: left;">Example Trope</th></tr><tr><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Lawful Good</strong></td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;">Follows the rules to do the right thing.</td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 0px;">The "Classic Hero" or Paladin.</td></tr><tr><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Neutral Good</strong></td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;">Does the right thing regardless of the law.</td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 0px;">A "Basically Nice Person".</td></tr><tr><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Chaotic Good</strong></td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;">Rebels against authority to help people.</td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 0px;">Robin Hood.</td></tr><tr><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Lawful Neutral</strong></td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;">Follows the law or a code strictly, no matter what.</td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 0px;">The "Strict Judge" or Soldier.</td></tr><tr><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">True Neutral</strong></td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;">Avoids taking sides or just wants to live their life.</td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 0px;">A typical farmer or animal.</td></tr><tr><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Chaotic Neutral</strong></td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;">Follows their own whims; values total freedom.</td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 0px;">The "Free Spirit" or wild card.</td></tr><tr><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Lawful Evil</strong></td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;">Uses the system and its rules to get what they want.</td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 0px;">A Tyrant or "The Empire".</td></tr><tr><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Neutral Evil</strong></td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;">Purely selfish; will do anything to get ahead.</td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gS5jXb); min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 0px;">A mercenary or pragmatist.</td></tr><tr><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: none; min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;"><strong style="font-weight: 700;">Chaotic Evil</strong></td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: none; min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 16px 12px 0px;">Unpredictable, destructive, and malicious.</td><td colspan="undefined" style="border-bottom: none; min-width: 4em; vertical-align: top; color: var(--bbQxAb); font-family: var(--LI4Bo); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: var(--XWv1if); letter-spacing: 0px; padding: 12px 0px;">The "Joker" or a monster.</td></tr></tbody></table></div><div></div><div role="heading" style="margin-block: 24px 12px; font-family: &quot;Google Sans&quot;, Roboto, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 20px; font-weight: var(--JT4IPc); line-height: var(--qYGXw); letter-spacing: 0px; color: var(--jINu6c);">Why It's Everywhere<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span></span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><div style="font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word; margin-block: var(--xdqYEb--pNrv5d,12px) var(--xdqYEb--i8AQde,16px);">The format went viral in the late 2010s because it’s a perfect "sorting hat" for fandoms. It allows people to argue over where a character fits, which generates engagement. Memes often use the chart absurdly—for instance, categorizing "How you organize your desktop" or "Ways to hold a pizza slice"—to show how even mundane habits can feel like a moral choice.<span><span style="white-space: nowrap; position: relative;"><span>&nbsp;</span><button tabindex="0" style="margin: 0px 6px 0px 0px; background-color: var(--aYn2S); border: none; border-radius: 10px; height: 20px; padding: 0px; width: 20px; outline: 0px; cursor: pointer;"><span style="color: var(--IXoxUe); display: inline-block; transform: rotate(135deg);"></span></button></span></span></div><div style="font-family: var(--nkmQOe); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0px; overflow-wrap: break-word; margin-block: var(--xdqYEb--pNrv5d,12px) var(--xdqYEb--i8AQde,16px);">Do you have a<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">specific character</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>or<span>&nbsp;</span><strong style="font-weight: 700;">topic</strong><span>&nbsp;</span>in mind that you want to try and "align" on a chart?<span style="visibility: hidden;"><span style="white-space: nowrap;
